cover.era_chip: 扶餘 · 高句麗 · 三韓
cover.subtitle:
다섯 나라, 다섯 풍습,
제천행사로 기억하라.
cover.imagePrompt: Ancient Korean federation-era illustration, 1st century BC. ONE chieftain figure (gun-jang) in long fur-lined robe and bronze ornament, standing on a wooden platform raising a bronze cup toward the sky during a sky-worship rite. Background: bonfire, log palisade, dark mountains. Composition: ceremonial, solemn. Color: clay-brown + bronze + amber firelight. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"영고 부여 · 동맹 고구려 · 무천 동예"
제천행사로 나라를 구분.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 풍습만 보여주고 나라를 묻는 자료형 문제가 자주 나온다. 영고(부여)·동맹(고구려)·무천(동예)의 달과 짝, 서옥제(고구려)와 민며느리제(옥저)의 혼인 풍속을 절대 혼동하지 말 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized bronze ritual bell icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small wooden sotdae pole silhouette with bird perched on top. Cream #F2EDE3 base + bronze #A98142 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
